title: Alive and Kicking
writer: William Dinner, William Morum, Denis Cannan
actors: Sybil Thorndike, Kathleen Harrison, Estelle Winwood
plot: Three elderly ladies tire of living in an old people's home and when they heard that they are about to be separated, they make a bid for freedom. They escape to an island off the Irish coast and are about to occupy a group of cott...
